name: Asparagus Almandine
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Fresh Asparagus OR 2 boxes Frozen Cooked Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain cooked asparagus.
2. Melt butter in a small skillet over low heat.
3. Cook almonds, stirring constantly, until golden brown, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in salt and lemon juice.
5. Pour the almond mixture over the hot asparagus.
6. Yield: 6 servings.
